title: Hackers stole Estée Lauder staff’s bank and health data. The company took nearly a year to say so.
summary: The cosmetics giant Estée Lauder is notifying staff of a data breach after hackers slipped into the Oracle software it uses to run human resources. Estée Lauder does not name the bug in its letter.
caption: output/2026-07-22/hackers-stole-est-e-lauder-staff-s-bank-and-health-data-the-company-to.txt
